name: Plaid Kids' Shower Curtain Blue - Pillowfort™
description: Bring classic style to your child's bath space with this Plaid Kids' Shower Curtain from Pillowfort™. This decorative shower curtain features a plaid print in blue on a white background for a neat finish. Made from recycled polyester-cotton blend twill fabric, you can toss it in the washing machine for easy upkeep, while the buttonhole top makes installation a breeze.
